info.title: aimeta
info.summary: Agent-facing metadata for a kdb+ process
info.description: HTTP surface for the aimeta module. GET / returns a tiny home document pointing at the discovery sidecars; /.well-known/api-catalog (RFC 9727) is the standards-track discovery entry point; /meta serves the canonical meta.json describing the host process's tables, columns, references, and public functions; /meta.schema.json serves the JSON Schema for that body. See https://github.com/KxSystems/aimeta for the source repo.

get.summary: Fetch the canonical meta.json for this process
get.description: Returns the full aimeta JSON document. Use the ETag header with If-None-Match for cache validation.

ETag.description: Opaque cache validator. Round-trip via If-None-Match.

304.description: Not Modified — If-None-Match matched the current ETag.

get.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the /meta response body

get.description: Tiny JSON listing the discovery sidecars and meta payload. Served so cold clients that probe / before any well-known path land on a self-describing response instead of 404.
application/linkset+json document linking this host's OpenAPI document, JSON Schema, and meta payload. The IETF standards-track answer to 'where is this API documented'.
